NON-DISCLOSURE AGREEMENT

This Non-Disclosure Agreement ("Agreement") is made and entered into as of October 15, 2023, by and between Dr. Tan Wei Ming, NRIC S2345678B, residing at 123 Orchard Road, Singapore, and Ms. Siti Aishah binti Abdullah, UEN T12LL3456E, with a registered office at 456 Bugis Street, Singapore.

1. Confidential Information. Both parties agree to maintain the confidentiality of all information disclosed under this Agreement. Confidential Information shall not include information that is publicly available or previously known to the receiving party. Dr. Tan Wei Ming can be contacted at +65 9876 5432 or wei.ming.tan@example.sg. Ms. Siti Aishah can be contacted at +65 8765 4321 or siti.abdullah@business.sg. This Agreement does not include any obligation to update the project status beyond initial disclosure.

2. Non-Disclosure Obligations. The parties shall not disclose any Confidential Information to third parties without prior written consent. The SPA, valued at SGD 1,000,000, outlines specific terms for such disclosures. Any breach of this clause will result in legal action. For more details, refer to https://example.sg/user/S2345678B. The obligations under this Agreement shall continue for a period of two years from the termination of the SPA.
